title: Aurora glassmorphism
neural_prompt: Frosted glass panels with flowing aurora gradients; soft inner glow; SVG aurora bands in hero; drift animation on decorative layers; buttons use springy hover lift and shimmer stroke; scroll-linked micro-parallax; dark mode = deep violet void with inverted glass.

title: Neo-brutalist daylight
neural_prompt: Bold outlines, thick borders, raw shadows (no blur stacks); clash of warm paper + acid accents; oversized typography; chunky toggles; staggered @keyframes on section reveals; hover uses hard offset shadows; reduced-motion snaps instead of slides.

title: Midnight terminal HUD
neural_prompt: Phosphor green/amber on near-black; monospace accents; scanline overlay subtle; HUD-style frames; typing cursor blink on hero; grid dots background SVG; focus rings like terminal selection; glitch micro-hit only on primary CTA hover.

title: Sunset D2C warmth
neural_prompt: Peach-to-magenta gradients; soft cards; lifestyle polish; gentle blob SVG backgrounds; price/hero numerals with subtle count-up ready structure; shadow stacks warm not gray; motion = ease-out floats on cards; dark mode warm charcoal not pure black.

title: Editorial luxury serif
neural_prompt: Magazine grid, generous whitespace; display serif + humanist sans pairing; thin rules and folios; hero with pull-quote styling; minimal motion — page-turn fade sections; illustrations as inline SVG line art; accent gold foil gradient sparingly.

title: Swiss minimal grid
neural_prompt: Strict grid, strong hierarchy, single accent color; no decoration noise; sharp corners; animation limited to opacity/transform 200ms; hero split layout; SVG geometric motif only; dark mode high-contrast monochrome.

title: Phosphor retro CRT
neural_prompt: Retro CRT vibe without illegibility: curved vignette optional in SVG; bloom on highlights; neon pink/cyan pairs; subtle vertical jitter animation disabled under prefers-reduced-motion; chunky pixel-friendly buttons scaled for touch.

title: Oceanic depth layers
neural_prompt: Layered blues/teals; caustic-light effect via SVG filters slow pulse; cards float with soft Z-motion; wave divider paths; depth fog gradient headers; subtle parallax on decorative SVG only; bioluminescent accents in dark mode.

title: Luxe gold on obsidian
neural_prompt: Obsidian backgrounds; metallic gold gradient typography accents; thin hairline frames; spotlight hover on cards; minimal particle sparkle SVG; motion restrained—ease luxury; forms feel jewelry-grade.

title: Organic sage wellness
neural_prompt: Muted sage, cream, clay tones; rounded 2xl surfaces; leaf/organic SVG motifs; breathing animation (slow scale) on hero blob; soft shadows; stress-test accessibility—contrast still WCAG-aimed; earth-tone dark mode.

title: Kinetic typography hero
neural_prompt: Oversized kinetic headline with split-line stagger reveal; scroll-triggered word emphasis via IntersectionObserver; background keeps subtle noise SVG; secondary UI stays calm so type shines; reduced-motion shows static balanced layout.

title: Mesh gradient poster
neural_prompt: Full-bleed mesh gradients (CSS + SVG stops); grain overlay optional; poster-like composition; floating glass capsule nav; animated gradient shift slow; buttons punch through with sharp contrast rings.

title: Cyberpunk HUD panels
neural_prompt: Angular HUD panels, diagonal cuts, neon magenta/cyan; animated dashed borders SVG; tiny marquee labels; hover brings neon bloom; secondary readouts in UI chrome; dark-only theme acceptable if contrast preserved.

title: Soft clay 3D feel
neural_prompt: Soft-pop clay aesthetic: inflated rounded rectangles; pillow shadows; playful bounce transitions; pastel palette; emoji-free professional icons via SVG faces/shapes; subtle tilt on card hover with CSS 3D (gentle).

title: Paper craft layered
neural_prompt: Layered paper sheets with realistic drop shadows; torn-edge SVG optional; stamp/seal accent; tactile transitions—slides feel like paper drag; light cream paper base; charcoal ink text.

title: Northern lights bands
neural_prompt: Aurora ribbons across header using SVG turbulence animated slowly; starfield subtle; cool teal/purple palette; cards glass-lite; interactive glow tracks cursor on hero (CSS ok); dark-first.

title: Copper industrial loft
neural_prompt: Copper/orange rust accents on slate; rivet/grid industrial SVG motifs; heavy section separators; motion like machinery ease-in-out; brushed metal gradients via CSS; rugged contrast.

title: Blossom pastel spring
neural_prompt: Soft pink/lilac/yellow pastels; floral line SVG accents; airy spacing; gentle float animations on petals; rounded pill buttons; spring easing everywhere; avoid infantile—keep typography crisp.

title: Blueprint technical
neural_prompt: Blueprint grid background; white/cyan lines on deep blue; measurement ticks SVG decorative; dashed outlines on cards; animation minimal snap-to-grid; engineer aesthetic for dashboards.

title: Aurora borealis cards
neural_prompt: Northern gradient shards behind frosted cards; vertical light pillars SVG animate slowly; crisp white typography; card hover lifts into aurora glow; constellation dot animation ultra subtle.
